capability: signal-derived novelty reserve (the protention tracks the recent novelty rate)
claim: At matched prior mass, newcomer surprise should be lower after a burst of newcomers and higher after a drought; the fixed reserve is blind to this.
stimulusShape: matched-mass dense/mid/barren + mass control + music/text omni
mechanism: reserved amplitude = γ-decayed recent newcomer-arrival rate (core/surprise.js noveltyReserve), through the same fixed Born step; context at the amplitude, law fixed.

scope.holds: figure+proposition fields, default horizon, ≥2 organs (omnimodal gate passed)
scope.fails: not promoted to default; entity-horizon birth-filtering deferred
